title: Section 24
content: (1) A Bill pending in the Legislative Assembly of 1[the Union territory] shall not lapse by reason of the prorogation of the Assembly. (2) A Bill which is pending in the Legislative Assembly of 1[the Union territory] shall lapse on a dissolution of the Assembly.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 1987, s. 65, for "a Union territory" (w.e.f. 30-5-1987)
